asset_name: Care Popup Icons — feed, clean, pet
shared_properties: Three 8x8 icons stay compact to protect the tiny play area.
Button panel uses a high-contrast navy frame for finger targeting.
Each icon keeps a single dominant silhouette for instant recognition.
differences: This file covers popup controls only.
Persistent HUD meter and status bubbles stay outside this task.

reference_images.label: proxy_hud_density
reference_images.purpose: Proxy UI reference for compressing three actions into a compact popup without crowding the play area.

reference_images.label: proxy_environment_spacing
reference_images.purpose: Proxy layout reference for keeping the popup clear of the perch and floor anchors.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/pico_echo/trial_5/ui_menu_care_popup_icons.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under ui_menu_care_popup_icons.
runtime_notes: Create a 2-column TextureAtlasLayout for active and cooldown states.
Spawn this popup only when the care menu is visible and anchor it near x=92 y=104 on the overlay camera.
Keep the panel above the world floor but above the HUD by a distinct z layer within the UI camera.

context.usage: Tap-triggered care menu shown near the lower-right corner with feed, clean, and pet actions.

icon_map: Feed icon at local x=2..9 uses a seed silhouette in #FFA300.
Clean icon at local x=14..21 uses a broom silhouette in #C2C3C7.
Pet icon at local x=26..33 uses a hand silhouette in #FFCCAA.
Cooldown state swaps active icon fills to #5F574F while keeping panel edges stable.

shape.silhouette: 36x12 popup strip divided into three 12x12 action cells for feed, clean, and pet.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 72x12px with two 36x12 states.
Each state contains three readable 8x8 icons on a navy panel with at least 2px spacing between icon boxes.
Cooldown state visibly desaturates every icon with #5F574F while keeping silhouettes readable.
Panel fits inside the 128x128 canvas at x=92 y=104 without covering the happiness bar.
